title: The Black Cat Plot Tightens Around Kaya
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now, for my special attack technique "Namari- Bashi"!! (bullet

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Good job! Keep up the good work!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I'm going to go rest a while!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: There are spikes behind us too!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Heh! Did you really think you guys could stop us?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Let's go! Captain Kuro is waiting for us!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
